name: S'more Cookie Bars
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Milk chocolate candy bars; cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease a 9-by-13-inch baking pan.
2. In a medium bowl, combine butter, shortening, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla. Beat until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, mix graham cracker crumbs, flour, and salt with the creamed mixture until just combined. Spread dough evenly into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 15 minutes in the preheated oven, or until edges are lightly browned and set (the center of the crust will still be soft). Cool completely.
5. In a heavy saucepan, heat whipping cream over low heat until simmering. Remove from heat, add chocolate pieces, and stir until melted and smooth. Add marshmallows and stir again until smooth. Spread mixture evenly over cooled crust. Refrigerate for about 2 hours before cutting into bars.
